name: Blueberry Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift together flour, ground ginger, cinnamon, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Dissolve baking soda in buttermilk.
5. Combine the dry ingredients with the creamed mixture using alternating spoonfuls of batter.
6. Stir in molasses until fully incorporated.
7. Fold in blueberries until evenly distributed.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan (or two small loaf pans).
9. Sprinkle sugar over the top of the batter.
10. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
